rows.label: tev002301_MSG0001
rows.name:
So this is your city?
Wow! It's really great![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0002
rows.name:
I've never seen so many
people in one place before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I sure do wish Celica and I could take
a peek inside all those shops...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0004
rows.name:
But the buildings are so small,
I probably wouldn't fit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0005
rows.name:
I always thought my strength would
only cause trouble for people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0006
rows.name:
But what with my new job in the
industrial district, I can use
it to help out all my friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0007
rows.name:
I've got to work extra hard
so that I can repay Chausson-san
for giving me the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0008
rows.name:
You're going off to fight so you can
get back something really important?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0009
rows.name:
The Growth are really scary, but I think
you're even stronger than they are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Er, but not muscle strength, exactly.
A different type. Something you
humans have that they don't.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0011
rows.name:
So go give 'em what for, and then we'll
have a big party when you return![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Mr. Dalton said that once the
Lifepoint's up and running again,
lots of humans are gonna come back here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0013
rows.name:
I guess they'll have to build a
whole bunch of buildings, or
else the city might overflow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0014
rows.name:
Thing is, I rather like Dalton-san.
And Bernat-san and Ryou-san, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0015
rows.name:
So I'm gonna work real hard to
help build lots of houses for
the people who are coming back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG0016
rows.name:
You don't need to worry about the city
overflowing. Go on and wake your sleepyhead
friends. We'll all be snugs as bugs in rugs here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG1001
rows.name:
When Celica watches me, it makes
me want to work even harder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG1002
rows.name:
I really like sitting here.
It's nice and squishy and
soft. Do you like it as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG1003
rows.name:
The guys gave me a "paycheck"
today. I hope Celica can show me
what I'm supposed to do with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG1004
rows.name:
Ooh, a shooting star! Look, Celica,
look! A shooting star! Right there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002301_MSG1005
rows.name: Awww... It's gone.[ST:wait ]
